sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59821" key="kreo" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρεο-</orth>, representing stem of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κρέας</foreign> in Compds., freq. written <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">κρεω</itype>- in codd.</entryFree>
